Advanced Plotting (sparscit.adv.pl)

Visualization functions for landscape plots, dynamics, HMMs, and summaries.

Landscape Plots

  • src.advanced.plotting._2d.landscape2d() — 2D landscape plot

  • src.advanced.plotting._2d.contour2d() — 2D contour plot

  • src.advanced.plotting._2d.categorical2d() — 2D categorical plot

  • src.advanced.plotting._3d.landscape3d() — 3D landscape plot

  • src.advanced.plotting._function.slice() — Slice a landscape

Dynamics & HMMs

  • src.advanced.plotting._dynamics.time_correlation() — Plot time correlations

  • src.advanced.plotting._dynamics.differential_dynamics() — Plot differential dynamics

  • src.advanced.plotting._dynamics.summary_overtime() — Plot summary over time

  • src.advanced.plotting._hmm.hidden_states() — Plot HMM hidden states

  • src.advanced.plotting._hmm.hmm_observations() — Plot HMM observations

  • src.advanced.plotting._hmm.hmm_likelihoods() — Plot HMM likelihoods

  • src.advanced.plotting._hmm.transition_matrix() — Plot HMM transition matrix

Community & Features

  • src.advanced.plotting._distances.active_subclusters() — Plot active sub-clusters

  • src.advanced.plotting._dendrogram.community_dendrogram() — Plot community dendrogram

  • src.advanced.plotting._features.venn_active_overlap() — Venn diagram of active feature overlap

Summaries

  • src.advanced.plotting._summary.summary_boxplot() — Boxplot summary

  • src.advanced.plotting._summary.summary_heatmap() — Heatmap summary

Color Utilities

  • src.advanced.plotting._cmap.custom_cmap() — Create a custom colormap

  • src.advanced.plotting._cmap.draw_cbar() — Draw a colorbar
